description: Negative/error-path: Sending a turn-incompatible command while activeTurn is set returns error.code===-32004. Client surfaces JSON-RPC error code -32004.
notes: Auto-generated from D7 negative paths: error.TurnInProgress.error.turn-active. Certain operations require no active turn. If sent while a turn is running, TurnInProgress (-32004) should be returned.

steps.label: send turnStart to trigger the error condition
